task_description: Write a technical specification for a file upload and processing pipeline that handles large files, supports multiple formats, generates thumbnails, and extracts metadata.

input_data.context: Users need to upload files (images, PDFs, videos up to 5GB) which must be processed asynchronously. Processing includes virus scanning, format validation, thumbnail generation, metadata extraction, and storage in a CDN-backed object store. The system should support resumable uploads for large files.

constraints.tech_stack: Go backend, S3-compatible object storage, PostgreSQL for metadata, Redis for job queues
constraints.scale: 50K uploads per day, files up to 5GB, 100TB total storage
constraints.latency_requirement: Upload initiation under 500ms, processing completion within 5 minutes for files under 100MB
constraints.compliance: Content scanning required, HIPAA-compatible storage encryption
